name: ClockOut
short_description: It's time to leave the office. No overtime work. Let's hurry home.
detailed_description:
-----------------------------------------------------------------
It's time to leave the office.
Just open the door in front of you,
and make your escape.

Oh, right.
Absolutely do not turn back or try to investigate anything.
In that case, I can't guarantee what will happen.

Got it?
-----------------------------------------------------------------
About the game
This is an instant-death mystery solving mini-game.

Solve the puzzle and leave the office through the true route...
Oops, there’s no such thing.
Just leave through the door in front of you after starting the game, and you’ll be fine.

Recommended play time: 30 minutes to 1 hour
-----------------------------------------------------------------
・Note
This game is more of a jump scare game (where scary images suddenly appear with loud sounds) than a horror game.
While it’s designed with a horror atmosphere, please play it thinking of it as a jump scare genre.

-----------------------------------------------------------------
Regarding streaming
I'm moved to tears that you would stream such a game.........................
Please Have a fun.
I would be even more thrilled if you could attach a link to the Steam page in the description.
-----------------------------------------------------------------
During the game, pressing the escape key will open the settings, where you can adjust sound volume, mouse sensitivity, and save your game.
Since it's just about leaving the office, you might think such settings are unnecessary, but please feel free to use them.
